name: musicd-lms-remote
description: A music-discovery PWA and wall display for Lyrion Music Server (LMS) — the LMS port of MusicD Remote. Random-album browsing, whole-library instant search, Play / Queue, and a Material-skin-level settings surface.
author: Lewis Menzies (Music Duck / MusicD)

scripts.test: node lib/lms.test.js && node lib/search.test.js && node lib/labels.test.js && node lib/updater.test.js
